posts.text: Kick off! Mexico vs South Africa at AT&T Stadium, let's go 🇲🇽
posts.label: POS

posts.text: South Africa looking organized in the early press
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Both teams finding their feet, neutral start
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Mexico building nicely through midfield, Lira pulling the strings
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Quinones making a real threat out wide, dangerous
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: GOOOAL! Quinones puts Mexico ahead! What a finish from Erik Lira's pass!
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Mexico score early! South Africa stunned. This is already going wrong for Bafana
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Not a great start for South Africa. They need to regroup quickly
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Mexico on top, South Africa struggling to get out of their half
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Bafana need to respond, this early goal could be costly
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: South Africa creating some positive moments now, Mokoena running hard
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Yellow card for Mokoena, silly foul in a dangerous position
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: SA giving away too many fouls, Mexico on free kick
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Good defensive block by South Africa, holding firm at 1-0
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Mexico maintaining control, South Africa trying to find their rhythm
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Yellow for Gutierrez too, both teams getting physical now
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: South Africa showing fight in midfield, Zwane looking lively
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Decent chance for Bafana, headed over. Encouraging signs
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Game is settling, Mexico happy to hold the lead and counter
posts.label: POS

posts.text: South Africa pushing forward, this is an open game now
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Half time approaching, Mexico lead 1-0. South Africa need to be better second half
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Alvarado almost doubled for Mexico! Great save from the keeper
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Half time: Mexico 1-0 South Africa. Comfortable for El Tri so far
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Second half underway, South Africa looking for the equalizer
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Better start from Bafana, Sithole winning the ball in midfield
posts.label: POS

posts.text: RED CARD! Sithole off for a reckless challenge. South Africa down to 10 men!
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Terrible decision from Sithole. South Africa's hopes just took a massive blow
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: This is a disaster for South Africa. Playing 40 mins with 10 men at this level is brutal
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Mexico smelling blood now, will pour forward against 10-man South Africa
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: South Africa digging deep, organized defensively despite the red card
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Mexico probing but Bafana defending in numbers, hard to break down
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Mexico patient in possession, South Africa compact. Solid defensive effort so far
posts.label: POS

posts.text: An hour gone. South Africa hanging on with 10, goal still needed to stay alive
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Mexico finding space on the flanks, South Africa's legs starting to go
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Almost a second for Mexico! Alvarado's shot deflected wide
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: South Africa tiring, Mexico turning the screw
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: GOAL! Raul Jimenez makes it 2-0! Alvarado's assist, composed finish. Game over for Bafana
posts.label: POS

posts.text: That's it. South Africa are done. 2-0 down, a man short, can't see them coming back
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: South Africa's tournament hopes are fading fast. Heartbreaking
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Mexico cruising now, brilliant performance against a depleted South Africa
posts.label: POS

posts.text: El Tri fans celebrating, this looks very comfortable
posts.label: POS

posts.text: South Africa desperate for a consolation, Zwane trying his best
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Another yellow for Bafana — Sibisi booked. SA falling apart
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Mexico comfortable, game's done. Managing the clock perfectly
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Still 2-0. South Africa have nothing to lose but also very little left in the tank
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: 80 mins: Mexico just holding on to the ball, South Africa chasing shadows
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: SA pushing forward desperately, leaving gaps at the back
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: RED CARD #2! Zwane off for South Africa! Down to 9 men! Total collapse
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: South Africa with 9 men in an 88th minute World Cup game. A disaster of a night
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Absolutely shambolic defending and discipline from Bafana. Embarrassing
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Mexico fans streaming out early to celebrate, the job is well and truly done
posts.label: POS

posts.text: 5 minutes of added time. South Africa's misery will last a bit longer
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Montes completely out of control, going to get a card
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: RED for Montes! Mexico also reduced, but doesn't matter. 2-0 standing
posts.label: NEU

posts.text: Full time: Mexico 2-0 South Africa. Convincing win for El Tri. Three reds, one yellow each
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Great result for Mexico. Jimenez and Quinones doing the business
posts.label: POS

posts.text: South Africa exit the World Cup. Hugely disappointing campaign, marred by red cards
posts.label: NEG

posts.text: Excited for this WC26 clash between Mexico and South Africa!
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Mexico fully in control after that early Quinones goal. Great atmosphere in Arlington
posts.label: POS

posts.text: Decent first half but needs more goals. South Africa have to respond
posts.label: POS
